OmniScript.description: Story - 2790 - Facility Rate Creation - Type of Rate = Stipend - Add "Stipend Tier" & "Admin Hours"
OmniScript.name: ServiceAccFacilityRateCreation

omniProcessElements.name: CANCEL
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Cancel", "validationRequired" : "Submit", "show" : null, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "pubsub" : false, "message" : { }, "targetType" : "Record", "objectAction" : "home", "recordAction" : "view", "loginAction" : "login", "targetFilter" : "Recent", "targetId" : "%ContextId%", "variant" : "brand", "iconName" : "", "iconVariant" : "", "iconPosition" : "left", "replace" : false, "targetLWCLayout" : "lightning", "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "" }

omniProcessElements.name: IP_CheckContractData
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "IP_CheckContractData", "integrationProcedureKey" : "ServiceAcc_FacilityRateCreation", "useContinuation" : false, "remoteOptions" : { "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "useFuture" : false, "chainable" : false }, "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "extraPayload" : { "ContextId" : "%ContextId%", "Err_ProcessType" : "ip", "Err_CtxId" : "%ContextId%", "Err_RunningContext" : "FacilityRateCreation" }, "inProgressMessage" : "In Progress", "postMessage" : "Done", "failureNextLabel" : "Continue", "failureAbortLabel" : "Abort", "failureGoBackLabel" : "Go Back", "failureAbortMessage" : "Are you sure?", "validationRequired" : "Step", "redirectPageName" : "", "redirectTemplateUrl" : "vlcAcknowledge.html", "redirectNextLabel" : "Next", "redirectNextWidth" : 3, "redirectPreviousLabel" : "Previous", "redirectPreviousWidth" : 3, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "show" : null, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "svgSprite" : "", "svgIcon" : "", "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "enableDefaultAbort" : false, "enableActionMessage" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "", "sendOnlyExtraPayload" : true }

omniProcessElements.name: IP_FetchAndCreateShiftRatesRecords
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "IP_FetchAndCreateShiftRatesRecords", "integrationProcedureKey" : "FacilityRate_CreatePreventiveCareAgreementRecords", "useContinuation" : false, "remoteOptions" : { "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "useFuture" : false, "chainable" : false }, "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "extraPayload" : { "ContextId" : "%ContextId%", "Rate" : "%STP_SelectShiftFacilityTitle:Rate%", "UnitOfMeasure" : "%STP_SelectShiftFacilityTitle:UnitOfMeasure%", "ListOfFacilityTitleIds" : "%STP_SelectShiftFacilityTitle:FacilityTitle%", "typeOfRate" : "%TypeOfRateFinal%", "ListOfType" : "%STP_SelectShiftFacilityTitle:Type%", "Notes" : "%STP_SelectShiftFacilityTitle:Notes%", "OverrideProhibited" : "%STP_SelectShiftFacilityTitle:OverrideProhibited%", "timeType" : "%STP_SelectShiftFacilityTitle:TimeType%", "dailyEncounterThreshold" : "%STP_SelectShiftFacilityTitle:DailyEncounterThreshold%", "dailyEncounterPayCap" : "%STP_SelectShiftFacilityTitle:DailyEncounterPayCap%", "targetPlanRate" : "%STP_SelectShiftFacilityTitle:TargetPlanRate%", "monthsProviderGuarantee" : "%STP_SelectShiftFacilityTitle:MonthsProviderGuarantee%", "monthsStartupGuarantee" : "%STP_SelectShiftFacilityTitle:MonthsStartupGuarantee%", "rVUMetricType" : "%STP_SelectShiftFacilityTitle:RVUMetricType%", "shifts" : "%STP_SelectShiftFacilityTitle:ShiftType:SelectedShiftstRecsFC:selectedShifts%", "stipendTier" : "%STP_SelectShiftFacilityTitle:StipendTier%", "adminHours" : "%STP_SelectShiftFacilityTitle:AdminHours%", "isShiftCoverageChange" : "%ContractShiftCoverageChange%" }, "inProgressMessage" : "In Progress", "postMessage" : "Done", "failureNextLabel" : "Continue", "failureAbortLabel" : "Abort", "failureGoBackLabel" : "Go Back", "failureAbortMessage" : "Are you sure?", "validationRequired" : "Step", "redirectPageName" : "", "redirectTemplateUrl" : "vlcAcknowledge.html", "redirectNextLabel" : "Next", "redirectNextWidth" : 3, "redirectPreviousLabel" : "Previous", "redirectPreviousWidth" : 3, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "show" : null, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "svgSprite" : "", "svgIcon" : "", "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : "Unable to create records, Please check with your system administrator." }, "enableDefaultAbort" : false, "enableActionMessage" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "", "sendOnlyExtraPayload" : true }

omniProcessElements.name: IP_FetchShiftFacilityRecords
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "IP_FetchShiftAndFacilityTitles", "integrationProcedureKey" : "FacilityRate_FetchShiftAndFacilityTitle", "useContinuation" : false, "remoteOptions" : { "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "useFuture" : false, "chainable" : false }, "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "extraPayload" : { "type" : "%TypeOfRateFinal%", "EmploymentTypeForShift" : "%STP_SelectTypeOfRate:EmploymentType%", "ContextId" : "%ContextId%", "variableType" : "%STP_SelectTypeOfRate:VariableType%", "ShiftTypeOptions" : "%STP_SelectTypeOfRate:ShiftTypeOptions%", "F_SelectedShiftsCount" : "%F_SelectedShiftsCount%", "previousShiftType" : "%previousShiftType%", "isShiftTypeGotChanged" : "%isShiftTypeGotChanged%", "isShiftCoverageChange" : "%ContractShiftCoverageChange%" }, "inProgressMessage" : "In Progress", "postMessage" : "Done", "failureNextLabel" : "Continue", "failureAbortLabel" : "Abort", "failureGoBackLabel" : "Go Back", "failureAbortMessage" : "Are you sure?", "validationRequired" : "Step", "redirectPageName" : "", "redirectTemplateUrl" : "vlcAcknowledge.html", "redirectNextLabel" : "Next", "redirectNextWidth" : 3, "redirectPreviousLabel" : "Previous", "redirectPreviousWidth" : 3, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "show" : null, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "svgSprite" : "", "svgIcon" : "", "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "enableDefaultAbort" : false, "enableActionMessage" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "", "sendOnlyExtraPayload" : true }

omniProcessElements.name: IP_RetainShiftSelection
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "IP_RetainShiftSelection", "integrationProcedureKey" : "FacilityRate_RetainShiftSelection", "useContinuation" : false, "remoteOptions" : { "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "useFuture" : false, "chainable" : false }, "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "extraPayload" : { "selectedShifts" : "%STP_SelectShiftFacilityTitle:ShiftType:SelectedShiftstRecsFC:selectedShifts%", "totalShifts" : "%shifts%" }, "inProgressMessage" : "In Progress", "postMessage" : "Done", "failureNextLabel" : "Continue", "failureAbortLabel" : "Abort", "failureGoBackLabel" : "Go Back", "failureAbortMessage" : "Are you sure?", "validationRequired" : "Step", "redirectPageName" : "", "redirectTemplateUrl" : "vlcAcknowledge.html", "redirectNextLabel" : "Next", "redirectNextWidth" : 3, "redirectPreviousLabel" : "Previous", "redirectPreviousWidth" : 3, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "show" : { "group" : { "operator" : "AND", "rules" : [ { "data" : "Shift", "condition" : "=", "field" : "TypeOfRateFinal" }, { "field" : "selectedShiftsCount", "condition" : ">", "data" : "0" } ] } }, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "svgSprite" : "", "svgIcon" : "", "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "enableDefaultAbort" : false, "enableActionMessage" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "", "sendOnlyExtraPayload" : true }

omniProcessElements.name: IP_RetainShiftSelection1
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "sendOnlyExtraPayload" : true, "businessEvent" : "", "businessCategory" : "", "enableActionMessage" : false, "enableDefaultAbort" : false, "errorMessage" : { "default" : null, "custom" : [ ] }, "svgIcon" : "", "svgSprite" : "", "pubsub" : false, "message" : { }, "ssm" : false, "wpm" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "show" : { "group" : { "operator" : "AND", "rules" : [ { "field" : "TypeOfRateFinal", "condition" : "=", "data" : "Shift" } ] } }, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "redirectPreviousWidth" : 3, "redirectPreviousLabel" : "Previous", "redirectNextWidth" : 3, "redirectNextLabel" : "Next", "redirectTemplateUrl" : "vlcAcknowledge.html", "redirectPageName" : "", "validationRequired" : "Step", "failureAbortMessage" : "Are you sure?", "failureGoBackLabel" : "Go Back", "failureAbortLabel" : "Abort", "failureNextLabel" : "Continue", "postMessage" : "Done", "inProgressMessage" : "In Progress", "extraPayload" : { "totalShifts" : "%shifts%", "selectedShifts" : "%STP_SelectShiftFacilityTitle:ShiftType:SelectedShiftstRecsFC:selectedShifts%" }, "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "preTransformBundle" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "remoteOptions" : { "chainable" : false, "useFuture" : false, "postTransformBundle" : "", "preTransformBundle" : "" }, "useContinuation" : false, "integrationProcedureKey" : "FacilityRate_RetainShiftSelection", "label" : "IP_RetainShiftSelection", "controlWidth" : 12 }

omniProcessElements.description: Added as part of US PR1050558-2018: If UnitOfMeasure is not perhour

childElements.name: TextBlock5
childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "TextBlock5", "text" : "

The ‘Rate' must match the previous rate entered for the selected Facility Title(s) & Shift Type(s). Select the Facility Title in such a way the rates will match.

", "show" : null, "dataJSON" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "textKey" : "", "sanitize" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: ShiftCoverageChangeError
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "label" : "Error", "validationRequired" : true, "previousLabel" : "Previous", "previousWidth" : 3, "nextLabel" : "Exit", "nextWidth" : "3", "cancelLabel" : "Cancel", "cancelMessage" : "Are you sure?", "saveLabel" : "Save for later", "saveMessage" : "Are you sure you want to save it for later?", "completeLabel" : "Complete", "completeMessage" : "Are you sure you want to complete the script?", "instruction" : "", "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "remoteClass" : "", "remoteMethod" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "remoteOptions" : { }, "knowledgeOptions" : { "language" : "English", "publishStatus" : "Online", "keyword" : "", "dataCategoryCriteria" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "typeFilter" : "" }, "show" : { "group" : { "operator" : "AND", "rules" : [ { "data" : "true", "condition" : "=", "field" : "ShowShiftError" } ] } }, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "instructionKey" : "", "chartLabel" : null, "allowSaveForLater" : true, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "" }

omniProcessElements.name: STP_Error
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "label" : "Error", "validationRequired" : true, "previousLabel" : "Previous", "previousWidth" : 3, "nextLabel" : "Exit", "nextWidth" : 3, "cancelLabel" : "Cancel", "cancelMessage" : "Are you sure?", "saveLabel" : "Save for later", "saveMessage" : "Are you sure you want to save it for later?", "completeLabel" : "Complete", "completeMessage" : "Are you sure you want to complete the script?", "instruction" : "", "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "remoteClass" : "", "remoteMethod" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "remoteOptions" : { }, "knowledgeOptions" : { "language" : "English", "publishStatus" : "Online", "keyword" : "", "dataCategoryCriteria" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "typeFilter" : "" }, "show" : { "group" : { "operator" : "AND", "rules" : [ { "data" : null, "condition" : "<>", "field" : "result:error" } ] } }, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "instructionKey" : "", "chartLabel" : null, "allowSaveForLater" : false, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "" }

childElements.name: AdminHours
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "autocomplete" : null, "disOnTplt" : false, "hide" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "debounceValue" : 0, "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "show" : { "group" : { "operator" : "AND", "rules" : [ { "field" : "STP_SelectTypeOfRate:TypeOfRate", "condition" : "=", "data" : "Stipend" } ] } }, "mask" : null, "placeholder" : "", "ptrnErrText" : "Please enter a value with no more than 3 digits and 2 decimal places.", "pattern" : "^\\d{1,3}(\\.\\d{1,2})?$", "helpTextPos" : "", "helpText" : "", "help" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "readOnly" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "repeatClone" : false, "repeat" : false, "required" : true, "inputWidth" : 12, "showInputWidth" : false, "label" : "Admin Hours", "controlWidth" : 6 }

childElements.name: DailyEncounterPayCap
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "autocomplete" : null, "disOnTplt" : false, "hide" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "debounceValue" : 0, "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "show" : { "group" : { "operator" : "AND", "rules" : [ { "data" : "Encounter", "condition" : "=", "field" : "STP_SelectTypeOfRate:VariableType" } ] } }, "placeholder" : "", "maxLength" : 255, "minLength" : 0, "ptrnErrText" : "", "pattern" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "helpText" : "", "help" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "readOnly" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "repeatClone" : false, "repeat" : false, "required" : true, "inputWidth" : 12, "showInputWidth" : false, "label" : "Daily Encounter Pay Cap", "controlWidth" : 6 }

childElements.name: DailyEncounterThreshold
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "Daily Encounter Threshold", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "pattern" : "", "ptrnErrText" : "", "minLength" : 0, "maxLength" : 255, "placeholder" : "", "show" : { "group" : { "operator" : "AND", "rules" : [ { "data" : "Encounter", "condition" : "=", "field" : "STP_SelectTypeOfRate:VariableType" } ] } }, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "debounceValue" : 0, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "autocomplete" : null }

childElements.name: F_IsOtherShiftSelected
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "F_IsOtherShiftSelected", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "expression" : "IF(IF(%ShiftType:SelectedShiftstRecsFC:selectedShifts:ShiftCode% != NULL,COUNTIF(%ShiftType:SelectedShiftstRecsFC:selectedShifts:ShiftCode%, != \"Shift Bonus\"),0) , true, false)", "hide" : true, "show" : null, "mask" : null, "dataType" : null, "hideGroupSep" : false, "dateFormat" : "MM-dd-yyyy", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: F_SelectedShiftCallCode
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "F_SelectedShiftCallCode", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "expression" : "IF(%ShiftType:SelectedShiftstRecsFC:selectedShifts:ShiftCode% == \"Call\", true, false)", "hide" : true, "show" : null, "mask" : null, "dataType" : null, "hideGroupSep" : false, "dateFormat" : "MM-dd-yyyy", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: F_SelectedShiftCode
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "disOnTplt" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "dateFormat" : "MM-dd-yyyy", "hideGroupSep" : false, "dataType" : null, "mask" : null, "show" : null, "hide" : true, "expression" : "CONTAINS(%ShiftType:SelectedShiftstRecsFC:selectedShifts:ShiftCode%, \"Shift Bonus\" )", "inputWidth" : 12, "showInputWidth" : false, "label" : "F_SelectedShiftCode", "controlWidth" : 12 }

childElements.name: F_SelectedShiftsCount
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "F_SelectedShiftsCount", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "expression" : "COUNTIF(%ShiftType:SelectedShiftstRecsFC:selectedShifts:selected%, = true )", "hide" : true, "show" : null, "mask" : null, "dataType" : null, "hideGroupSep" : false, "dateFormat" : "MM-dd-yyyy", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "disOnTplt" : false }

MonthsProviderGuarantee

childElements.name: Notes
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "Notes", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "mask" : "", "pattern" : "", "ptrnErrText" : "", "minLength" : 0, "maxLength" : 255, "placeholder" : "", "show" : { "group" : { "operator" : "OR", "rules" : [ { "data" : "Stipend", "condition" : "=", "field" : "TypeOfRateFinal" }, { "field" : "TypeOfRateFinal", "condition" : "=", "data" : "Variable" }, { "field" : "TypeOfRateFinal", "condition" : "=", "data" : "Leadership Incentives" } ] } }, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "debounceValue" : 0, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "autocomplete" : null }

omniProcessElements.name: STP_ShiftNotExistError
SV_AfterFacilitySelection
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "SV_AfterFacilitySelection", "elementValueMap" : { "showShiftError" : "=IF(%TypeOfRateFinal% == \"Shift\" && %F_SelectedShiftsCount% == 0, true, NULL)", "ShowShiftCodeError" : "=IF(%TypeOfRateFinal% == \"Shift\" && (%F_SelectedShiftCode% == true && %UnitOfMeasure% != \"per Shift\"), true, false)", "showShiftCallError" : "=IF(%TypeOfRateFinal% == \"Shift\" && (%F_SelectedShiftCallCode% == true && (%UnitOfMeasure% != \"per Shift\" || %UnitOfMeasure% != \"per Hour\")), true, false)" }, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "show" : null, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: SV_AfterTypeOfRateSelection
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "SV_AfterTypeOfRateSelection", "elementValueMap" : { "isShiftTypeGotChanged" : "=IF(%TypeOfRateFinal% == \"Shift\" && (%previousShiftType% == null || %previousShiftType% != %ShiftTypeOptions%),true, false)", "previousShiftType" : "=IF(%previousShiftType% == null , %ShiftTypeOptions%, %previousShiftType%)", "TypeOfRateFinal" : "=IF(%ContractShiftCoverageChange% == false, %TypeOfRate%, %TypeOfRateforShiftCoverageChange%)\n" }, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "show" : null, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: SV_BeforeFacilitySelection
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "SV_BeforeFacilitySelection", "elementValueMap" : { "showShiftError" : "=IF(%TypeOfRateFinal% == \"Shift\", false, NULL)" }, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "show" : null, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false }
